description_long: This is a rustic cabin constructed primarily from weathered wood and corrugated metal sheets, giving it a utilitarian and aged appearance. The roof is a simple gable style, covered with mismatched, rust-stained metal panels. The exterior walls appear to be made of rough, possibly plastered or mud-coated material, with visible wooden supports and beams. A wooden walkway and porch wrap around the front and one side, elevated on stilts, suggesting adaptation to uneven or wet terrain. There is a single small window on the front facade and a large open section along one side, possibly serving as an open-air living space or entrance. The overall structure is modest, functional, and evokes a sense of rural or informal urban edge living.
description: A rustic, weathered cabin with a gable metal roof, rough walls, and an elevated wooden porch and walkway. The structure features a small window and a large open side, emphasizing its utilitarian and aged character.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the small window, rough wall texture, and the main entrance area with the wooden porch and walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, open section of the cabin, the full length of the porch, and the corrugated metal roof.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the plain back wall, wooden supports, and the wraparound walkway.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the gable roof's patchwork metal panels and the overall rectangular footprint of the cabin.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with corrugated metal panels, moderate overhangs, visibly weathered and patched
attribute_window_arrangement: one small rectangular window centered on the front facade, asymmetrical distribution with no other visible windows
attribute_door_placement: one large open entrance along the side, adjacent to the porch and walkway, no visible traditional doors
